raw_consumer_statement:
Complaint Against American Express - Unauthorized Charges and Dispute Resolution On XX/XX/2024, I made a purchase using my American Express card for order a dress for {$58000.00} from XXXX XXXX XXXX. Unfortunately, the merchandise was lost during the delivery process, and I did not receive it. As a result, I initiated a dispute with American Express to request a refund for the charges. 
To my disappointment, American Express repeatedly holds the disputed charges and then releases them when the merchant claims that the package had been delivered. This procedure has been ongoing, and it puts me in a difficult position as I am unable to pay for merchandise I never received until American Express can provide proof that I actually received it. 
I have made multiple attempts to communicate with American Express to resolve this matter, but the issue remains unresolved. I have explained the situation and provided all necessary documentation to support my claim, yet the charges continue to be reinstated without any further investigation. 
I kindly request your intervention in this matter. I believe that American Express 's handling of this dispute is unfair and unjust. I am concerned that their actions may have a negative impact on my credit history and financial well-being. 
I urge the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to investigate this case thoroughly and ensure that American Express follows proper dispute resolution procedures. I request that American Express be compelled to provide a fair and prompt resolution to this dispute, either by providing evidence that I received the merchandise or by refunding the charges. 
I appreciate your attention to this matter and the assistance you can provide in resolving this dispute. Please feel free to contact me if you require any additional information or documentation.
